name: American Electric Power
analysis: AEP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $130.3000, stop $124.7004, target $147.0988 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
